description_long: This is a tall, rectangular apartment building with a modern facade, featuring a mix of light gray and blue tones. The structure has a grid-like arrangement of windows on its main faces, with some sections highlighted by blue-tinted glass panels. Large vertical signage with Chinese characters is visible on two sides, suggesting a possible hotel or mixed-use function. The base of the building is wider, with horizontal striping and a recessed entrance area. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on verticality. The building appears to have at least 14 floors, with no visible balconies and a flat roof.
description: A tall, modern apartment building with a grid of windows, blue glass panels, and vertical signage in Chinese. The facade is primarily gray and blue, with a wide, striped base and a flat roof.
description_view_0: The front view shows a grid of windows and a wide, striped base, with the main entrance area visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: This side view features large blue glass panels and prominent vertical Chinese signage, with windows arranged in a single column.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a similar grid of windows as the front, but with a central blue glass strip and no visible entrance.
description_view_3: This side view is dominated by a large blue glass facade and vertical Chinese signage, with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with consistent spacing and alignment across the main facades, creating a symmetrical and orderly appearance.
